name: Anise- Fennel
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the fern-like tops and remove tough outer stalks.
2. Cut off the heavy base.
3. Slice the stalks into thin lengthwise strips.
4. Wash, drain, and cook in boiling salted water or broth until tender (15-20 minutes).
5. Drain and add melted butter, salt, pepper, and sweet basil to serve.
